title: Quay.io images out of date
body:
Hello,

quay.io/buldah/stable is missing the latest releases (v1.44.0 and v1.43.2 at least). Not sure if this is expected or not, but wanted to raise awareness.

Thanks!

comments.body:
This is expected (at least in the sense of how the image builds are designed) because we pull builds from fedora stable repos there and these updates will not land in fedora stable for a while.

https://github.com/containers/image_build

There is also the other issue that the CI system there was shut off so there is no automation at the moment to build any images until someone has time to rework the entire CI system there
